title: Cobblemon Journey Mounts
body:
# Cobblemon Journey Mounts
Turn your Cobblemon world into a true adventure route.
Cobblemon Journey Mounts adds more fully rideable Pokémon to explore your world by land, sea, and sky – perfect for servers and singleplayer alike.

# DOWNLOAD THE RESOURCEPACKS FOR VERSIONS 1.7 & ABOVE

## Features
🐎 New land mounts for fast travel across routes and biomes

🌊 Extra water mounts for surfing oceans, rivers, and cliffsides

☁️ Flying-ready Pokémon for smooth gliding and high-altitude travel

🛠️ Currently includes 280+ New Rideable Pokemon

⚡ Works with Mega Showdown, MissingMon, ZA Megas

⚠️ Incompatible / Known Issues with
- AllTheMons x Mega Showdown
- More Level Up Moves

## Current Regions
Kanto, Johto Hoenn, Sinnoh, Unova, Kalos, Alola, Galar & Paldea

## Credits 
- [Cobblemon Team](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) – for the base Cobblemon mod and original Pokémon implementations.  
- [MegaShowdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) – for Mega Evolution support and for allowing the use of certain Mega-related assets (such as Mewtwo and other Megas) within Cobblemon Journey Mounts, used with permission.  
- [ZA Megas](https://modrinth.com/datapack/navas-zamega) – for providing additional Mega Evolution models and assets used for rideable mounts in Cobblemon Journey Mounts, used with permission.  
- [MissingMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/missingmons-cobblemon) – for providing models and assets for Pokémon not yet available in base Cobblemon, integrated as rideable mounts in Cobblemon Journey Mounts, used with permission.
